description: The operator must maintain a state of physical cleanliness.
source_excerpt: The Operator ought to be clean, chaste, to repent of his sins, and earnestly desire to cease from sinning

description: The operator must maintain a state of sexual chastity.
source_excerpt: The Operator ought to be clean, chaste, to repent of his sins, and earnestly desire to cease from sinning

description: The operator must repent of past sins.
source_excerpt: The Operator ought to be clean, chaste, to repent of his sins, and earnestly desire to cease from sinning

description: The operator must have an earnest desire to stop committing sins.
source_excerpt: The Operator ought to be clean, chaste, to repent of his sins, and earnestly desire to cease from sinning

description: The operator must approach the study with fear, silence, and trembling.
source_excerpt: The Note is to be looked into, with fear, silence and trembling.

description: A fast of two or three days is recommended before seeking divine revelation to discern the nature of one's desires.
source_excerpt: it is good to fast two or three dayes; that is may be Divinely revealed, whether thy desires be good or evil.

description: The study of the art should be read during appointed times of the Lunation (e.g., fourth day of the Moon, eighth, twelfth).
source_excerpt: Let it be read in appointed times of the Lunation; as, in the fourth day of the Moon, the eighth and twelfth...

description: The operator must begin with a Trinitarian invocation asking for illumination and knowledge.
source_excerpt: Now in the Name of Christ, on the first day of the Month, in which thou wouldst acquire Memory, Eloquence and Understanding

description: The operator must pronounce a special Oration to obtain Eloquence before proceeding.
source_excerpt: This Holy Oration which followeth, is a certain special Oration, to obtain Eloquence

description: The operator must pronounce the first Oration of the 10 without any precedent work to acquire Memory, Eloquence and understanding.
source_excerpt: This is the first Oration of the 10, which may be pronounced by its self, without any precedent work to acquire Memory, Eloquence and understanding
